case_title: JOHN QUILLINAN et al VS. WILLIAM MCELFRESH et al

docket_entries.description: FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUILLINAN, JOHN QUILLINAN, MOSHE QUILLINAN, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MCELFRESH, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUILLINAN, JOHN QUILLINAN, MOSHE QUILLINAN, KEVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUILLINAN, JOHN QUILLINAN, MOSHE QUILLINAN, KEVIN SERVED FEB-01-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCELFRESH, WILLIAM
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-18-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
